text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I lost.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Dammit... Why? I satisfied all the conditions.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Did I time my last spurt incorrectly? Or was my
pacing off? Maybe I underestimated the winner,
or Parcae's settings were wrong...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(No, there's no point speculating now. I can
analyze all that later. Right now, I have to run the
numbers again.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Air Shakur left already?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: No way! She never even looked over here...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Is she sulking just because she lost? Wow, the
rumors were right. She really is a total diva.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to Parcae's calculations, her loss here
means Air Shakur is not on her optimal route. She
must've run off to check her data.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurry after Air Shakur and find her hunched
quietly over her computer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What could've affected the results?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The answer's changed yet again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The seven-centimeter gap has shrunk down to
three.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've recalculated the numbers twice already, but
the answer hasn't budged.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what the catalyst for the change was, but
that doesn't change the fact that the numbers
have changed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just three more centimeters... Just three more measly centimeters... If I can get this down to zero...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh. Look at me, gettin' all carried away.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This only means the numbers for the optimal
route have decreased. If I can't get it down to
zero...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then it's still the end of the road.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
First, I gotta hit the target numbers that'll have
me lose by seven centimeters, then I have to find
the variable that'll shrink that gap to zero...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Go on back without me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur leaves before I can get in a word. She
probably wants to work somewhere quiet.
Meanwhile, a nearby conversation catches my
attention.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that just now? I guess that's how she
always is... totally full of herself.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Is she even upset that she lost? I dunno if I can
cheer for someone like that...
choice_data_list: (...It's not my place to say anything.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Closing this seven-centimeter gap'll snuff out
the noise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain Air Shakur will perform spectacularly
at the Japanese Derby. And when that happens,
I'm sure everyone's opinion on her will change.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as she can win some big races, the fans
will come around.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Are things really changing?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I don't get those crappy nightmares anymore.
That's all over—it's a new start from here on
out...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I've only got three centimeters to go. If I can just
shrink that down to zero...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what if three centimeters is the closest I'll
ever get?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What if all this does is delay the inevitable and
make me get my hopes up for nothin'?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Rrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No... I'm being ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Think. Think! Rack your brain for an answer. The goddess of victory still eludes me, but...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'll do whatever it takes to chase her down!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just you wait for the Japanese Derby!
